name: Teton Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Choteau school board held special meeting in June 2024 reportedly to discuss Teton Bus Service route bus contract; no public M&A or ownership news identified.
fit_notes: Tiny single-yard rural Montana contractor (~14 employees, est. ~$0.6M revenue) serving Choteau schools. Out of Summit's core geography and likely too small to be a meaningful tuck-in absent a regional rollup play.

name: Peterson Bussing LLC
districts_or_customers: Merrill Area Public Schools (Lincoln County, WI)
recent_news: 2019 incident involving a Peterson Bussing driver accused of making a bomb-threat comment to elementary students on a Merrill route (no criminal charges filed). No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Family-owned single-yard contractor serving Merrill Area Public Schools. Small (~17 employees, ~$0.5M revenue) — fits Summit's tuck-in profile only as part of a Wisconsin micro-rollup; standalone scale is marginal.

name: Weston Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: Weston School District (Cazenovia, WI / Richland & Sauk County area)
recent_news: No M&A, ownership change, or material news identified; Weston School District has continued to advertise for student transportation drivers in the Cazenovia area.
fit_notes: Very small rural WI contractor tied to the Weston School District in Cazenovia. ~13 employees, ~$0.5M revenue — sub-scale for a direct platform tuck-in; only relevant as fill-in within a broader Wisconsin consolidation.

name: Gary James Transport LTD
districts_or_customers: Gillett School District (Oconto County, WI) area
recent_news: No M&A or ownership news identified; incorporated in Wisconsin in 1999, continues to operate as a small school-bus contractor in Gillett.
fit_notes: Small Oconto County family-owned contractor; ~15 employees, ~$0.5M revenue. Sub-scale standalone but typical micro-target for a Wisconsin rollup; owner-age/succession unknown but worth a discreet outreach.

name: Otte School Buses
districts_or_customers: Cedar Grove-Belgium Area School District and nearby Sheboygan County districts (charter/wedding work also noted)
recent_news: No M&A or ownership change identified; long-running family operator (since 1968) under second-generation owner Jonathan Otte, also d/b/a Otte Bus Service, Inc.
fit_notes: Multi-generation Sheboygan County family operator (since 1968) with ~25 employees and a charter sideline — better-than-average tuck-in profile for a Wisconsin micro-rollup. Long tenure suggests potential succession angle; worth a relationship-driven approach.
